category_sources: Official GitHub README describes is-fast as a CLI utility for retrieving information from the web.
source_facts.description says it checks the internet as fast as possible.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is Magic-JD/is-fast.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents command usage, flags, caching, logging, selectors, and scripting examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Magic-JD/is-fast; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes direct web retrieval, CSS selectors, caching, logging, and script usage.
